23, 31, 28, 45, 30, 29, 37, 41, 25, 33, 40, 26, 38, 42, 35
\nConstruct a stem-and-leaf diagram for this data.
为这些数据构建一个茎叶图。

### Exercise 6: Interpreting Stem-and-Leaf (解释茎叶图)\nUsing the stem-and-leaf diagram from Exercise 5:
使用练习5中的茎叶图：
\na) Find the mode age. (找出众数年龄。)
\nb) Find the median age. (找出中位数年龄。)
\nc) Find the range of ages. (找出年龄的极差。)

### Exercise 7: Calculating Statistics (计算统计数据)\nFor the following set of numbers: 5, 8, 12, 5, 10, 7, 15
对于以下数字集合：5, 8, 12, 5, 10, 7, 15
\na) Calculate the mean. (计算平均数。)
\nb) Find the median. (找出中位数。)
\nc) Find the mode. (找出众数。)
\nd) Calculate the range. (计算极差。)
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Two-Way Table and Percentages (双向表与百分比)\nA group of 150 students were asked if they prefer reading books or watching movies, and if they are male or female.
一组150名学生被问及他们更喜欢读书还是看电影，以及他们是男生还是女生。

*   80 students prefer reading books.
*   60 students are male.
*   35 male students prefer watching movies.
\na) Complete a two-way table to show this information.
完成一个双向表来显示这些信息。
\nb) What percentage of female students prefer reading books?
有多少百分比的女生喜欢读书？
\nc) What percentage of all students prefer watching movies?
所有学生中有多少百分比喜欢看电影？

### Homework 2: Frequency Tree Diagram (频率树图)\nIn a school, 60% of students walk to school. Of those who walk, 70% are boys. Of those who do not walk, 40% are girls. There are 200 students in total.
在一所学校里，60%的学生步行上学。在步行上学的学生中，70%是男生。在不步行上学的学生中，40%是女生。总共有200名学生。
\nDraw a frequency tree diagram to represent this information and find out how many girls walk to school.
绘制一个频率树图来表示这些信息，并找出有多少女生步行上学。

### Homework 3: Frequency Polygon for Continuous Data (连续数据的频率多边形)\nThe heights (in cm) of 40 plants were measured and grouped into the following frequency table:
测量了40株植物的高度（厘米），并将其分组到以下频率表中：

| Height (cm) (高度) | Frequency (频率) |
| :----------------- | :--------------- |
| $10 \le h < 20$    | 5                |
| $20 \le h < 30$    | 12               |
| $30 \le h < 40$    | 15               |
| $40 \le h < 50$    | 8                |
\nDraw a frequency polygon to represent this data. Remember to use midpoints for the class intervals.
绘制一个频率多边形来表示这些数据。请记住使用类间隔的中点。

### Homework 4: Back-to-Back Stem-and-Leaf Diagram (背对背茎叶图)\nThe scores of two different classes, Class A and Class B, in a math test (out of 50) are given below:
两个不同班级，A班和B班，在一次数学测试中的分数（满分50分）如下：

**Class A:** 25, 31, 38, 29, 40, 33, 27, 42, 35, 28, 30
**Class B:** 22, 30, 35, 28, 41, 32, 26, 39, 34, 29, 31
\na) Construct a back-to-back stem-and-leaf diagram for these two sets of data.
为这两组数据构建一个背对背茎叶图。
\nb) Compare the performance of Class A and Class B based on their median scores and ranges. Which class performed better overall?
根据中位数分数和极差，比较A班和B班的表现。哪个班级总体表现更好？

### Homework 5: Real-life Data Analysis (真实生活数据分析)\nA company recorded the number of complaints received each month over a year:
一家公司记录了一年内每月收到的投诉数量：

15, 12, 18, 20, 10, 25, 17, 14, 22, 19, 16, 21
\na) Calculate the mean, median, mode, and range of the complaints.
计算投诉的平均数、中位数、众数和极差。
\nb) Which statistic (mean, median, or mode) would be most appropriate to describe the 'typical' number of complaints received? Explain your choice.
哪种统计数据（平均数、中位数或众数）最适合描述收到的“典型”投诉数量？解释你的选择。
\nc) If the company aims to keep the number of complaints below 15 per month, what conclusion can you draw from this data?
如果公司目标是每月投诉数量低于15起，你能从这些数据中得出什么结论？

learning_objectives.objective: Be able to complete and use two-way tables to record discrete data. Be able to create a two-way table from worded problems. (this can also be done using frequency tree diagrams). 能够完成和使用双向表记录离散数据。能够从文字问题中创建双向表（也可以使用频率树图完成）。
Calculate statistics and select those most appropriate to the problem. 计算统计数据，并选择最适合问题的数据。
Select, draw, and interpret diagrams and graphs, including 选择、绘制和解释图表和图，包括
frequency diagrams for discrete and continuous data (line graph, frequency polygon). 离散和连续数据的频率图（线图、频率多边形）。
line graphs for time series. 时间序列的线图。
stem-and-leave diagrams including back-to-back stem-and-leaf diagrams. 茎叶图（包括背对背茎叶图）。
Interpret tables, graphs and diagrams for discrete and continuous data, and draw conclusions, relating statistics and findings to the original question. 解释离散和连续数据的表格、图表和图，并得出结论，将统计数据和发现与原始问题相关联。

teachingUnits.title: Working with Irrational Numbers 理数的运算
learning_objectives: Recap the concept of rational numbers, irrational numbers, and real numbers, know that real numbers are composed of rational numbers and irrational numbers, and that real numbers correspond one-to-one with points on the number line. 回顾有理数、无理数和实数的概念，了解实数由有理数和无理数组成，并且实数与数轴上的点一一对应。
Know the different categories of real numbers including rational and irrational numbers. 了解实数的不同类别，包括有理数和无理数。
To understand the concepts of square root, arithmetic square root, and cube root. 理解平方根算术、平方根和立方根的概念。
Be able to represent the square root, arithmetic square root, and cube root of numbers using root notation. 能够使用根号表示数的平方根、算术平方根和立方根。
To understand that root and power are inverse operations of each other. 理解根和幂是互为逆运算。
Use the opposite and absolute value of real numbers to understand negatives when taking roots. 使用相反数和绝对值来理解取负数根。
To be able to find the square root of a perfect square number within 100 using square operation. 能够使用平方运算找到100以内完美平方数的平方根。
To be able to find the cube root of a perfect cube number, within 1000, using knowledge of cube numbers. 能够使用立方运算找到1000以内完美立方数的立方根。
To be able to calculate square roots and cube roots using a calculator effectively and solve practical problems. 能够有效地使用计算器计算平方根和立方根，并解决实际问题。
Understand the properties of surds. 理解根式的性质。
Be able to simplify surds. 能够简化根式。
Be able to do simple calculations with surds (addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division). 能够进行简单的根式运算（加、减、乘、除）。
To be able to estimate the approximate range of an irrational number using rational numbers and roots. 能够使用有理数和根来估计无理数的大致范围。
To be able to approximate solutions to roots by estimation. 能够通过估算来近似求解根的解。

sub_units.title: Recap – Real Numbers 回顾 – 实数
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1\nClassify the following numbers into as many categories as possible (e.g., Real, Rational, Integer, Natural):
$\frac{3}{4}$, $-5$, $\sqrt{7}$, $0.333...$, $\pi$, $0$, $2.5$, $\sqrt{9}$.

### Exercise 2\nDetermine if the following statements are True or False. Explain your reasoning.\na) All integers are rational numbers.\nb) All rational numbers are integers.

### Exercise 3\nGive an example of an irrational number that is greater than $3$ but less than $4$.

### Exercise 4\nPlace the following numbers on a number line: $-2.5$, $0$, $\sqrt{4}$, $-\frac{1}{2}$, $\pi$.

### Exercise 5\nExplain why $0.1010010001...$ (where the number of zeros between ones increases by one each time) is an irrational number.

### Exercise 6\nIdentify which of the following are rational numbers:
$\sqrt{16}$, $\sqrt{10}$, $\frac{22}{7}$, $3.14159$.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1
Categorize each number into the smallest possible set (Natural, Integer, Rational, Irrational, Real):
a) $-10$
b) $\sqrt{25}$
c) $0.121221222...$
d) $ rac{1}{3}$
e) $\sqrt{11}$
f) $0$

### Homework 2
Determine if the following statements are true or false. Justify your answer.
a) The sum of two irrational numbers is always irrational.
b) Every real number can be represented as a point on the number line.

### Homework 3
Arrange the following numbers in ascending order:
$3.14$, $\pi$, $\sqrt{9}$, $3.\overline{14}$, $ rac{22}{7}$.

### Homework 4
A square has an area of $10 	ext{ cm}^2$. Is the side length of the square a rational or irrational number? Explain your reasoning. (一个正方形的面积是 $10 	ext{ cm}^2$。请问这个正方形的边长是有理数还是无理数？请解释你的理由。)

### Homework 5
Consider the number $0.75$.
a) Is it a rational number? If so, express it as a fraction.
b) Is it an integer?
c) Is it a real number?

learning_objectives.objective: Recap the concept of rational numbers, irrational numbers, and real numbers, know that real numbers are composed of rational numbers and irrational numbers, and that real numbers correspond one-to-one with points on the number line. 回顾有理数、无理数和实数的概念，了解实数由有理数和无理数组成，并且实数与数轴上的点一一对应。
Know the different categories of real numbers including rational and irrational numbers. 了解实数的不同类别，包括有理数和无理数。

sub_units.title: Square root, arithmetic square root, and cube root 平方根、算数平方根和立方根
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1
Find the square roots of the following numbers:
a) $49$
b) $100$
c) $0.25$

### Exercise 2
Find the arithmetic square root of the following numbers:
a) $81$
b) $144$
c) $0.09$

### Exercise 3
Find the cube roots of the following numbers:
a) $64$
b) $125$
c) $-27$

### Exercise 4
Use root notation to represent:
a) The positive square root of $169$.
b) The cube root of $-8$.

### Exercise 5
Explain why $(\sqrt{5})^2 = 5$ and $\sqrt{5^2} = 5$. What does this tell you about roots and powers?

### Exercise 6
Calculate using a calculator, rounding to two decimal places:
a) $\sqrt{7}$
b) $\sqrt[3]{50}$

### Exercise 7
A square field has an area of $64 	ext{ m}^2$. What is the length of one side of the field? (一个正方形田地的面积是 $64 	ext{ m}^2$。求该田地一边的长度。)

### Exercise 8
What are the square roots of $121$? What is the arithmetic square root of $121$?
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1
Calculate the following:
a) $\pm\sqrt{196}$
b) $\sqrt{0.04}$
c) $\sqrt[3]{-216}$
d) $\sqrt[3]{0.008}$

### Homework 2
If $x^2 = 289$, find the value(s) of $x$. If $y^3 = -729$, find the value of $y$.

### Homework 3
Evaluate:
a) $(\sqrt{13})^2$
b) $\sqrt{(-7)^2}$
c) $\sqrt[3]{(-4)^3}$

### Homework 4
A cube-shaped box has a volume of $512 	ext{ cm}^3$. What is the length of one edge of the box? (一个立方体盒子的体积是 $512 	ext{ cm}^3$。求该盒子一条棱的长度。)

### Homework 5
Use a calculator to find the value of $\sqrt{150}$ and $\sqrt[3]{300}$ to three significant figures.

### Homework 6
If the arithmetic square root of a number is $15$, what is the number? If the cube root of a number is $-6$, what is the number?

learning_objectives.objective: To understand the concepts of square root, arithmetic square root, and cube root. 理解平方根算术、平方根和立方根的概念。
Be able to represent the square root, arithmetic square root, and cube root of numbers using root notation. 能够使用根号表示数的平方根、算术平方根和立方根。
To understand that root and power are inverse operations of each other. 理解根和幂是互为逆运算。
Use the opposite and absolute value of real numbers to understand negatives when taking roots. 使用相反数和绝对值来理解取负数根。
To be able to find the square root of a perfect square number within 100 using square operation. 能够使用平方运算找到100以内完美平方数的平方根。
To be able to find the cube root of a perfect cube number, within 1000, using knowledge of cube numbers. 能够使用立方运算找到1000以内完美立方数的立方根。
To be able to calculate square roots and cube roots using a calculator effectively and solve practical problems. 能够有效地使用计算器计算平方根和立方根，并解决实际问题。

sub_units.title: Quadratic Surds 二次根式
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1
Identify which of the following are quadratic surds:
$\sqrt{5}$, $\sqrt{9}$, $\sqrt[3]{7}$, $2\sqrt{3}$, $\sqrt{18}$.

### Exercise 2
Simplify the following surds:
a) $\sqrt{20}$
b) $\sqrt{72}$
c) $\sqrt{48}$

### Exercise 3
Perform the following additions and subtractions:
a) $3\sqrt{2} + 5\sqrt{2}$
b) $7\sqrt{3} - \sqrt{12}$
c) $\sqrt{18} + \sqrt{8}$

### Exercise 4
Perform the following multiplications and divisions:
a) $\sqrt{3} 	imes \sqrt{7}$
b) $\sqrt{6} 	imes \sqrt{10}$
c) $ rac{\sqrt{24}}{\sqrt{3}}$
d) $(2\sqrt{5})^2$

### Exercise 5
Rationalize the denominator of the following expressions:
a) $ rac{1}{\sqrt{2}}$
b) $ rac{6}{\sqrt{3}}$

### Exercise 6
Simplify: $\sqrt{50} - \sqrt{32} + \sqrt{2}$.

### Exercise 7
Given a rectangle with length $3\sqrt{5}$ cm and width $\sqrt{20}$ cm. Find its perimeter in simplest surd form.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1
Simplify the following expressions:
a) $\sqrt{125}$
b) $\sqrt{98}$
c) $\sqrt{162} - \sqrt{50}$
d) $3\sqrt{27} + 2\sqrt{3} - \sqrt{75}$

### Homework 2
Perform the following operations and simplify your answers:
a) $\sqrt{5} 	imes \sqrt{15}$
b) $(2\sqrt{3} + \sqrt{2})(2\sqrt{3} - \sqrt{2})$
c) $ rac{\sqrt{45}}{\sqrt{5}}$
d) $ rac{10\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}}$

### Homework 3
Rationalize the denominator and simplify:
a) $ rac{3}{\sqrt{6}}$
b) $ rac{1}{2 + \sqrt{3}}$

### Homework 4
If the area of a rectangle is $24 	ext{ cm}^2$ and its width is $2\sqrt{3} 	ext{ cm}$, find its length in simplest surd form. (如果一个长方形的面积是 $24 	ext{ cm}^2$，宽是 $2\sqrt{3} 	ext{ cm}$，求其长度的最简根式形式。)

### Homework 5
Simplify the expression: $\sqrt{2}(\sqrt{8} + \sqrt{18})$.

### Homework 6
Show that $ rac{\sqrt{12} + \sqrt{27}}{\sqrt{3}}$ is a rational number.

learning_objectives.objective: Understand the properties of surds. 理解根式的性质。
Be able to simplify surds. 能够简化根式。
Be able to do simple calculations with surds (addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division). 能够进行简单的根式运算（加、减、乘、除）。

sub_units.title: Estimate square roots and cube roots 估算平方根和立方根
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1\nBetween which two consecutive integers does $\sqrt{13}$ lie? (无理数 $\sqrt{13}$ 介于哪两个连续整数之间？)

### Exercise 2\nEstimate $\sqrt{40}$ to one decimal place. Show your working.

### Exercise 3\nBetween which two consecutive integers does $\sqrt[3]{100}$ lie?

### Exercise 4\nWithout using a calculator, determine which is larger: $\sqrt{20}$ or $4.5$.

### Exercise 5\nA square has an area of $50 \text{ cm}^2$. Estimate the length of its side to the nearest whole number.

### Exercise 6\nOrder the following numbers from smallest to largest: $3$, $\sqrt{10}$, $3.3$.

### Exercise 7\nEstimate the value of $\sqrt{75}$ to one decimal place.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nEstimate the value of $\sqrt{60}$ to two decimal places. Show your steps.

### Homework 2\nBetween which two consecutive integers does $\sqrt[3]{200}$ lie? Justify your answer.

### Homework 3\nA circular garden has an area of $30 \pi \text{ m}^2$. Estimate the radius of the garden to the nearest meter. (一个圆形花园的面积是 $30 \pi \text{ m}^2$。估算花园的半径到最接近的整数米。)

### Homework 4\nPlace the following numbers on a number line, showing their approximate positions: $\sqrt{2}$, $\sqrt{17}$, $\sqrt[3]{60}$, $2.5$.

### Homework 5\nWithout using a calculator, determine which is smaller: $\sqrt{90}$ or $9.4$. Explain your reasoning.

### Homework 6\nIf a cube has a volume of $150 \text{ cm}^3$, estimate the length of its side to one decimal place.

learning_objectives.objective: To be able to estimate the approximate range of an irrational number using rational numbers and roots. 能够使用有理数和根来估计无理数的大致范围。
To be able to approximate solutions to roots by estimation. 能够通过估算来近似求解根的解。

teachingUnits.title: Working with Expressions 表达式的运算
learning_objectives: Consolidate collecting like terms and simplifying algebraic expressions. 巩固合并同类项和简化代数表达式。
To be able to fluently substitute values into algebraic expressions and formula including those formula with indices. 能够熟练地将值代入代数表达式和公式，包括有指数的公式。
Consolidate the knowledge of the index laws and be able to apply them in calculations. 巩固指数定律的知识，并能够在计算中应用它们。
To be able to read and write both large and small numbers in standard form. 能够读写大数和小数的科学计数法。
To be able to do basic calculations with standard form. 能够进行科学计数法的基本运算。
To be able to apply standard form to a range of real-life and scientific problems. 能够将科学计数法应用于各种实际和科学问题。
Consolidate the distributive law of multiplication over addition and subtraction when expanding single bracket expressions. E.g., 巩固乘法分配律在展开单括号表达式中的应用。例：。

Understand the rules of expanding brackets and be able to expand double brackets and simplify the expressions by collecting like terms after the expansion. E.g.,. 理解展开括号的规则，并能够展开双括号表达式并在展开后收集同类项简化表达式。例：。
Be able to recognize the formula for difference of squares expressions and use the formula to solve the calculation appropriately. 能够识别平方差公式并使用该公式进行正确计算。
Be able to recognize the formula for a perfect square binomial expression and use the formula to solve the calculation appropriately. 能够识别完全平方二项式公式并使用该公式进行正确计算。
Review the skill of factorisation of a linear expression, using prime factor decomposition, when necessary, to find the highest common factor. 复习使用质因数分解来找到最高公因数的线性表达式的因式分解技能。
Be able to factorize simple quadratic expressions by using appropriate methods (common factor extraction, difference of squares, perfect squares etc.). 能够使用适当的方法（公因数提取、平方差、完全平方等）因式分解简单的二次表达式。

sub_units.title: Recap – Algebraic expressions 回顾 – 代数表达式
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Simplifying Expressions (简化表达式)\nSimplify the following algebraic expressions by collecting like terms.
通过合并同类项简化以下代数表达式。
\na) $3x + 5y - x + 2y$
\nb) $7a - 4b + 2a - b$
\nc) $5p^2 + 3p - 2p^2 + p$
\nd) $4(m+2) - 3m$

### Exercise 2: Substituting Values (代入求值)\nIf $x=3$ and $y=-2$, evaluate the following expressions.
如果 $x=3$ 且 $y=-2$，计算以下表达式的值。
\na) $2x + 3y$
\nb) $x^2 - y$
\nc) $5xy + x^2$

### Exercise 3: Formula Application (公式应用)\nThe formula for the area of a trapezium is $A = \frac{1}{2}(a+b)h$, where $a$ and $b$ are the lengths of the parallel sides and $h$ is the height.
梯形面积的公式是 $A = \frac{1}{2}(a+b)h$，其中 $a$ 和 $b$ 是平行边的长度，$h$ 是高。
\nCalculate the area of a trapezium if $a=6$ cm, $b=10$ cm, and $h=4$ cm.
如果 $a=6$ 厘米，$b=10$ 厘米，$h=4$ 厘米，计算梯形的面积。

### Exercise 4: Expressions with Indices (含指数的表达式)\nEvaluate the following expressions if $a=2$ and $b=-3$.
如果 $a=2$ 且 $b=-3$，计算以下表达式的值。
\na) $a^3 + b^2$
\nb) $(a+b)^2$
\nc) $2a^2b$

### Exercise 5: Word Problem (应用题)\nThe cost of hiring a car is given by the formula $C = 50 + 0.25d$, where $C$ is the total cost in dollars and $d$ is the distance travelled in kilometres.
租车的费用由公式 $C = 50 + 0.25d$ 给出，其中 $C$ 是总费用（美元），$d$ 是行驶距离（公里）。
\nCalculate the cost of hiring a car for a journey of 300 km.
计算行驶 300 公里租车的费用。
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Advanced Simplification (进阶简化)\nSimplify the following expressions.
简化以下表达式。
\na) $3(2x - y) - 2(x + 3y)$
\nb) $m^2 + 4mn - 2n^2 - 3mn + 5n^2$
\nc) $5(a^2 - 2a) - (3a^2 + 7a)$

### Homework 2: Substitution with Fractions and Negatives (分数和负数代入)\nIf $p = \frac{1}{2}$, $q = -4$, and $r = 3$, evaluate the following expressions.
如果 $p = \frac{1}{2}$，$q = -4$ 且 $r = 3$，计算以下表达式的值。
\na) $4p^2 + qr$
\nb) $(q - r)^2$
\nc) $\frac{p+r}{q}$

### Homework 3: Real-Life Formula (实际生活公式)\nThe formula for converting temperature from Celsius ($C$) to Fahrenheit ($F$) is $F = \frac{9}{5}C + 32$.
将摄氏温度 ($C$) 转换为华氏温度 ($F$) 的公式是 $F = \frac{9}{5}C + 32$。
\na) Convert $25^{\circ}C$ to Fahrenheit.
将 $25^{\circ}C$ 转换为华氏温度。
\nb) Convert $-10^{\circ}C$ to Fahrenheit.
将 $-10^{\circ}C$ 转换为华氏温度。

### Homework 4: Challenging Substitution (挑战性代入)\nGiven $A = x^2 - 2y$ and $B = 3x + y^2$.
已知 $A = x^2 - 2y$ 且 $B = 3x + y^2$。
\nIf $x=-1$ and $y=2$, find the value of $A + B$.
如果 $x=-1$ 且 $y=2$，求 $A + B$ 的值。

learning_objectives.objective: Consolidate collecting like terms and simplifying algebraic expressions. 巩固合并同类项和简化代数表达式。
To be able to fluently substitute values into algebraic expressions and formula including those formula with indices. 能够熟练地将值代入代数表达式和公式，包括有指数的公式。

sub_units.title: Laws of indices 指数定律
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Product Rule (乘法法则)\nSimplify the following expressions.
简化以下表达式。
\na) $x^4 \times x^3$
\nb) $y^2 \times y^5 \times y$
\nc) $2a^3 \times 3a^2$

### Exercise 2: Quotient Rule (除法法则)\nSimplify the following expressions.
简化以下表达式。
\na) $m^8 \div m^3$
\nb) $\frac{p^6}{p^2}$
\nc) $10b^7 \div 5b^4$

### Exercise 3: Power of a Power Rule (幂的乘方法则)\nSimplify the following expressions.
简化以下表达式。
\na) $(k^3)^2$
\nb) $(2x^4)^3$
\nc) $(a^2b^3)^4$

### Exercise 4: Zero and Negative Indices (零指数和负指数)\nEvaluate the following.
计算以下各项的值。
\na) $7^0$
\nb) $5^{-1}$
\nc) $3^{-2}$
\nd) $(2x)^0$
\ne) $4^{-2}$

### Exercise 5: Mixed Laws (混合法则)\nSimplify the following expressions, leaving your answers with positive indices.
简化以下表达式，答案只保留正指数。
\na) $(x^2)^3 \times x^4$
\nb) $\frac{y^5 \times y^2}{y^3}$
\nc) $(3a^2b)^2 \times a^{-1}b^3$

### Exercise 6: Numerical Evaluation (数值计算)\nEvaluate the following.
计算以下各项的值。
\na) $2^3 \times 2^{-1}$
\nb) $(3^2)^2 \div 3^3$
\nc) $(5^0 + 5^1) \times 5^{-2}$
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Comprehensive Simplification (综合简化)\nSimplify the following expressions, leaving your answers with positive indices.
简化以下表达式，答案只保留正指数。
\na) $(4x^3y^2)^2 \div (2xy)^3$
\nb) $\frac{(a^2b^{-1})^3}{a^4b^{-2}}$
\nc) $(m^2n^3)^0 \times (m^{-1}n^2)^{-2}$

### Homework 2: Evaluating with Negative Bases (负底数求值)\nEvaluate the following.
计算以下各项的值。
\na) $(-2)^3 \times (-2)^{-1}$
\nb) $(-3)^2 + (-3)^0$
\nc) $(-\frac{1}{2})^{-2}$

### Homework 3: Applying Index Laws to Numbers (指数定律在数字中的应用)\nWithout using a calculator, evaluate the following.
不使用计算器，计算以下各项的值。
\na) $2^5 \times 0.5^5$
\nb) $\frac{6^7}{2^7 \times 3^7}$
\nc) $(4^3 \times 2^3) \div 8^2$

### Homework 4: Problem Solving (问题解决)\nIf $2^x = 8$ and $3^y = 81$, find the value of $x^y$.
如果 $2^x = 8$ 且 $3^y = 81$，求 $x^y$ 的值。

learning_objectives.objective: Consolidate the knowledge of the index laws and be able to apply them in calculations. 巩固指数定律的知识，并能够在计算中应用它们。

sub_units.title: Standard Form 科学计数法
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Writing in Standard Form (写成科学计数法)\nWrite the following numbers in standard form.
将以下数字写成科学计数法。
\na) $450000$
\nb) $0.000072$
\nc) $300000000$
\nd) $0.00000000123$

### Exercise 2: Writing as Ordinary Numbers (写成普通数字)\nWrite the following numbers as ordinary numbers.
将以下数字写成普通数字。
\na) $6.2 \times 10^5$
\nb) $1.05 \times 10^{-3}$
\nc) $9 \times 10^8$
\nd) $3.4 \times 10^{-6}$

### Exercise 3: Multiplication and Division (乘法和除法)\nCalculate the following, giving your answers in standard form.
计算以下各项，并将答案写成科学计数法。
\na) $(2 \times 10^3) \times (4 \times 10^5)$
\nb) $(9 \times 10^7) \div (3 \times 10^2)$
\nc) $(1.5 \times 10^{-2}) \times (2 \times 10^{-4})$
\nd) $(8 \times 10^4) \div (2 \times 10^{-3})$

### Exercise 4: Addition and Subtraction (加法和减法)\nCalculate the following, giving your answers in standard form.
计算以下各项，并将答案写成科学计数法。
\na) $(3 \times 10^4) + (2 \times 10^4)$
\nb) $(5 \times 10^{-3}) - (1 \times 10^{-3})$
\nc) $(4 \times 10^5) + (2 \times 10^4)$ (Hint: Make the powers of 10 the same first.)

### Exercise 5: Real-Life Application (实际应用)\nThe speed of light is approximately $3 \times 10^8$ metres per second. The Earth is approximately $1.5 \times 10^{11}$ metres from the Sun.
光速约为每秒 $3 \times 10^8$ 米。地球距离太阳约为 $1.5 \times 10^{11}$ 米。
\nHow long does it take for light from the Sun to reach Earth? Give your answer in seconds, in standard form.
太阳光到达地球需要多长时间？以秒为单位，用科学计数法表示你的答案。
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Mixed Conversions (混合转换)\nConvert the following numbers as indicated.
按要求转换以下数字。
\na) $0.00000056$ to standard form.
\nb) $7.89 \times 10^9$ to an ordinary number.
\nc) $123456789$ to standard form (to 3 significant figures).

### Homework 2: Challenging Calculations (挑战性计算)\nCalculate the following, giving your answers in standard form.
计算以下各项，并将答案写成科学计数法。
\na) $(4.5 \times 10^6) \times (3 \times 10^{-2})$
\nb) $(1.2 \times 10^{-5}) \div (6 \times 10^{-8})$
\nc) $(7.2 \times 10^3) + (8 \times 10^2)$
\nd) $(2.5 \times 10^{-4}) - (5 \times 10^{-5})$

### Homework 3: Scientific Problem (科学问题)\nThe mass of a proton is approximately $1.67 \times 10^{-27}$ kg. The mass of an electron is approximately $9.11 \times 10^{-31}$ kg.
质子的质量约为 $1.67 \times 10^{-27}$ 千克。电子的质量约为 $9.11 \times 10^{-31}$ 千克。
\na) How many times heavier is a proton than an electron? Give your answer to the nearest whole number.
质子比电子重多少倍？将你的答案四舍五入到最接近的整数。
\nb) What is the combined mass of a proton and an electron? Give your answer in standard form to 3 significant figures.
质子和电子的总质量是多少？用科学计数法表示你的答案，保留3位有效数字。

learning_objectives.objective: To be able to read and write both large and small numbers in standard form. 能够读写大数和小数的科学计数法。
To be able to do basic calculations with standard form. 能够进行科学计数法的基本运算。
To be able to apply standard form to a range of real-life and scientific problems. 能够将科学计数法应用于各种实际和科学问题。

sub_units.title: Expanding brackets 展开括号
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Expanding Single Brackets (展开单括号)\nExpand the following expressions.
展开以下表达式。
\na) $4(x+3)$
\nb) $-2(y-5)$
\nc) $3a(a+b)$
\nd) $x(x^2 - 2x + 1)$

### Exercise 2: Expanding and Simplifying Single Brackets (展开并简化单括号)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions.
展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $5(m+2) + 3m$
\nb) $2(3p-1) - 4p$
\nc) $x(x+4) - 2x^2$

### Exercise 3: Expanding Double Brackets (展开双括号)\nExpand the following expressions.
展开以下表达式。
\na) $(x+1)(x+2)$
\nb) $(y-3)(y+4)$
\nc) $(a-5)(a-2)$
\nd) $(2p+1)(p-3)$

### Exercise 4: Expanding and Simplifying Double Brackets (展开并简化双括号)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions.
展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $(x+3)(x+4) + 2x$
\nb) $(y-2)(y+5) - 3y$
\nc) $(2m-1)(m+3) + m^2$

### Exercise 5: Area Problem (面积问题)\nThe length of a rectangle is $(x+5)$ cm and its width is $(x-2)$ cm.
一个长方形的长度是 $(x+5)$ 厘米，宽度是 $(x-2)$ 厘米。
\nExpand and simplify an expression for the area of the rectangle.
展开并简化表示长方形面积的表达式。
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Mixed Single Bracket Expansion (混合单括号展开)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions.
展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $3(2x-y) - 5(x+2y)$
\nb) $a(a^2+3a) - 2a^2(a-1)$
\nc) $p(p+q) + q(p-q)$

### Homework 2: Challenging Double Bracket Expansion (挑战性双括号展开)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions.
展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $(3x-2)(x+4)$
\nb) $(y-5)(2y-3)$
\nc) $(4a+1)(4a-1)$
\nd) $(x+2)^2 - (x-1)^2$

### Homework 3: Geometric Application (几何应用)\nA square has a side length of $(x+3)$ units. A rectangle has a length of $(x+5)$ units and a width of $(x+1)$ units.
一个正方形的边长是 $(x+3)$ 单位。一个长方形的长度是 $(x+5)$ 单位，宽度是 $(x+1)$ 单位。
\na) Write an expanded and simplified expression for the area of the square.
写出表示正方形面积的展开并简化的表达式。
\nb) Write an expanded and simplified expression for the area of the rectangle.
写出表示长方形面积的展开并简化的表达式。
\nc) Find the difference between the area of the rectangle and the area of the square, in its simplest form.
求长方形面积与正方形面积之差，并将其化为最简形式。

learning_objectives.objective: Consolidate the distributive law of multiplication over addition and subtraction when expanding single bracket expressions. E.g., 巩固乘法分配律在展开单括号表达式中的应用。例：。

Understand the rules of expanding brackets and be able to expand double brackets and simplify the expressions by collecting like terms after the expansion. E.g.,. 理解展开括号的规则，并能够展开双括号表达式并在展开后收集同类项简化表达式。例：。

sub_units.title: Multiplication formulas 乘法公式
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Difference of Squares (平方差)\nExpand the following expressions using the difference of squares formula $(a-b)(a+b) = a^2 - b^2$.
使用平方差公式 $(a-b)(a+b) = a^2 - b^2$ 展开以下表达式。
\na) $(x-4)(x+4)$
\nb) $(y+7)(y-7)$
\nc) $(2a-3)(2a+3)$
\nd) $(5p+q)(5p-q)$

### Exercise 2: Perfect Square Binomial (完全平方二项式)\nExpand the following expressions using the perfect square formulas $(a+b)^2 = a^2 + 2ab + b^2$ and $(a-b)^2 = a^2 - 2ab + b^2$.
使用完全平方公式 $(a+b)^2 = a^2 + 2ab + b^2$ 和 $(a-b)^2 = a^2 - 2ab + b^2$ 展开以下表达式。
\na) $(x+5)^2$
\nb) $(y-6)^2$
\nc) $(3m+1)^2$
\nd) $(4k-2)^2$

### Exercise 3: Applying Formulas to Numbers (公式在数字中的应用)\nUse the multiplication formulas to calculate the following without a calculator.
不使用计算器，利用乘法公式计算以下各项。
\na) $103^2$
\nb) $99^2$
\nc) $52 \times 48$
\nd) $201 \times 199$

### Exercise 4: Mixed Practice (混合练习)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions.
展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $(x+2)^2 + (x-2)(x+2)$
\nb) $(3y-1)^2 - (3y+1)^2$

### Exercise 5: Identifying and Using Formulas (识别和使用公式)\nWhich formula would you use to expand $(2x+5)(2x-5)$? Expand it.
你会用哪个公式来展开 $(2x+5)(2x-5)$？展开它。
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Advanced Formula Expansion (进阶公式展开)\nExpand and simplify the following expressions using the appropriate multiplication formulas.
使用适当的乘法公式展开并简化以下表达式。
\na) $(x^2+3)(x^2-3)$
\nb) $(2ab-c)^2$
\nc) $(x+y+z)(x+y-z)$ (Hint: Let $A = x+y$)

### Homework 2: Numerical Calculation Challenge (数值计算挑战)\nUse the multiplication formulas to calculate the following without a calculator.
不使用计算器，利用乘法公式计算以下各项。
\na) $10.5^2$
\nb) $9.8^2$
\nc) $1004 \times 996$

### Homework 3: Proving Identities (证明恒等式)\nShow that $(a+b)^2 - (a-b)^2 = 4ab$.
证明 $(a+b)^2 - (a-b)^2 = 4ab$。

### Homework 4: Real-Life Application (实际应用)\nA square garden has a side length of $(x+2)$ meters. A new design increases one side by 3 meters and decreases the other side by 3 meters, forming a rectangle.
一个正方形花园的边长是 $(x+2)$ 米。一个新的设计将其中一边增加3米，另一边减少3米，形成一个长方形。
\na) Write an expression for the area of the original square garden.
写出原正方形花园面积的表达式。
\nb) Write an expression for the area of the new rectangular garden.
写出新长方形花园面积的表达式。
\nc) By how much does the area change? Use a multiplication formula to help you.
面积变化了多少？使用乘法公式来帮助你。

learning_objectives.objective: Be able to recognize the formula for difference of squares expressions and use the formula to solve the calculation appropriately. 能够识别平方差公式并使用该公式进行正确计算。
Be able to recognize the formula for a perfect square binomial expression and use the formula to solve the calculation appropriately. 能够识别完全平方二项式公式并使用该公式进行正确计算。

sub_units.title: Factorization 因式分解
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Factorizing by Common Factor (提取公因数因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions.
因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $6x + 9$
\nb) $10y - 15$
\nc) $4a^2 + 8a$
\nd) $3x^2y - 6xy^2$

### Exercise 2: Factorizing Difference of Squares (平方差因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions.
因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $x^2 - 16$
\nb) $y^2 - 81$
\nc) $4a^2 - 25$
\nd) $9p^2 - 49q^2$

### Exercise 3: Factorizing Perfect Square Trinomials (完全平方三项式因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions.
因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $x^2 + 6x + 9$
\nb) $y^2 - 10y + 25$
\nc) $4m^2 + 4m + 1$
\nd) $9k^2 - 12k + 4$

### Exercise 4: Factorizing Simple Quadratic Trinomials (简单二次三项式因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions of the form $x^2 + bx + c$.
因式分解以下 $x^2 + bx + c$ 形式的表达式。
\na) $x^2 + 5x + 6$
\nb) $x^2 - 7x + 10$
\nc) $x^2 + x - 12$
\nd) $x^2 - 2x - 15$

### Exercise 5: Mixed Factorization (混合因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions using the most appropriate method.
使用最合适的方法因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $5x^2 - 20$
\nb) $3y^2 + 18y + 27$
\nc) $x^3 - x$
\nd) $2a^2 - 12a + 18$
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Advanced Common Factor (进阶公因数)\nFactorize the following expressions.
因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $12x^3y^2 - 18x^2y^3 + 6x^2y^2$
\nb) $a(x+y) + b(x+y)$
\nc) $p(m-n) - q(n-m)$

### Homework 2: Challenging Quadratic Factorization (挑战性二次因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions completely.
将以下表达式完全因式分解。
\na) $16x^2 - 1$
\nb) $x^2 + 14x + 49$
\nc) $3x^2 + 15x + 18$
\nd) $2y^2 - 50$

### Homework 3: Factorizing by Grouping (分组因式分解)\nFactorize the following expressions by grouping terms.
通过分组因式分解以下表达式。
\na) $ax + ay + bx + by$
\nb) $x^2 - 3x + 2xy - 6y$

### Homework 4: Real-Life Application (实际应用)\nThe area of a rectangular field is given by the expression $x^2 + 8x + 15$ square meters. If the length of the field is $(x+5)$ meters, find an expression for the width of the field.
一个长方形田地的面积由表达式 $x^2 + 8x + 15$ 平方米给出。如果田地的长度是 $(x+5)$ 米，求田地宽度的表达式。

learning_objectives.objective: Review the skill of factorisation of a linear expression, using prime factor decomposition, when necessary, to find the highest common factor. 复习使用质因数分解来找到最高公因数的线性表达式的因式分解技能。
Be able to factorize simple quadratic expressions by using appropriate methods (common factor extraction, difference of squares, perfect squares etc.). 能够使用适当的方法（公因数提取、平方差、完全平方等）因式分解简单的二次表达式。

teachingUnits.title: Algebraic Functions 代数函数
learning_objectives: Draw linear graphs from given data or a given equation. 从给定数据或给定方程绘制线性图像。
Find the gradient, intercept, and equation of a linear graph. 找到线性图像的斜率、截距和方程。
Interpret and use a variety of linear graphs such as currency conversion graphs. 解释并使用各种线性图像，如货币转换图。
Calculate the length and the mid-points of a line segment given the coordinates of the endpoints. 计算给定端点坐标的线段的长度和中点。
Identify the equations of parallel and perpendicular lines to a given linear function (and/or given co-ordinates). 确定与给定线性函数（或给定坐标）平行和垂直的直线方程。
Direct and inverse proportion. 正和反比例。
Real-life examples of direct and inverse proportion. 正和反比例的实际例子。
Understand the meaning of Functions and investigate real-life and cross-curricular links with functions. 理解函数的含义，并调查函数的实际和跨学科联系。
Understand the equations of direct and inverse proportion (as functions of x) and the graphical representation of these. 理解正和反比例的方程（作为x的函数）及其图形表示。
Represent functions in different ways: algebraically, graphically, and numerically. Introduce the notation of functions. 以不同方式表示函数：代数、图形和数值。介绍函数的符号。
Be able to identify visually a variety of graphs of such as basic quadratics, cubic, 1/x,ax etc. (do not need to be able to plot them). 能够直观地识别各种函数图形，如基本二次函数、立方函数、1/x，ax等（不需要能够绘制它们）。
Apply the idea of rates of change to simple kinematics involving distance-time and speed-time graphs. 将变化率的概念应用于涉及距离-时间和速度-时间图的简单运动学。
Understand gradients representing acceleration and deceleration and be able to calculate the distance travelled as area under a speed-time graph. 理解代表加速度和减速度的斜率，并能够计算速度-时间图下的面积表示的距离。
Calculate the average speeds of parts or a whole distance-time graph. 计算距离-时间图的部分或整体的平均速度。

sub_units.title: Recap 回顾
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Plotting Points and Drawing a Line (描点并画线)
Plot the following points on a coordinate plane and draw a straight line through them: $( -2, 5)$, $(0, 1)$, $(2, -3)$.

### Exercise 2: Finding Gradient (求斜率)
Find the gradient of the line passing through the points $(3, 7)$ and $(5, 11)$.

### Exercise 3: Finding Intercepts (求截距)
A line has the equation $y = 3x - 6$.
a) Find the y-intercept.
b) Find the x-intercept.

### Exercise 4: Writing the Equation of a Line (写出直线方程)
Write the equation of the line with a gradient of $-2$ and a y-intercept of $4$.

### Exercise 5: From Graph to Equation (从图像到方程)
The graph below shows the cost of hiring a bicycle. The x-axis represents hours and the y-axis represents cost in dollars.

(Imagine a graph starting at (0, 10) and going up to (4, 30) linearly)

a) What is the initial cost (y-intercept)?
b) What is the hourly rate (gradient)?
c) Write the equation of the line in the form $C = mh + c$, where $C$ is cost and $h$ is hours.

### Exercise 6: Currency Conversion (货币换算)
If the exchange rate is $1 	ext{ USD} = 7.2 	ext{ CNY}$.
a) Plot a graph showing the conversion from USD to CNY for up to 10 USD.
b) Use your graph or equation to find how many CNY you would get for 5.5 USD.
c) How many USD would you need to get 100 CNY?
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Graphing and Equation (绘图与方程)
a) Plot the points $( -3, -1)$, $(0, 2)$, $(3, 5)$ on a coordinate plane and draw the line.
b) Find the gradient of this line.
c) Find the y-intercept of this line.
d) Write the equation of the line in the form $y = mx + c$.

### Homework 2: Interpreting a Linear Graph (解释线性图像)
The graph shows the temperature (in $^\circ C$) of a liquid over time (in minutes) as it cools.

(Imagine a graph starting at (0, 80) and going down to (10, 30) linearly)

a) What was the initial temperature of the liquid?
b) What is the rate of cooling (gradient)? Include units.
c) Write the equation for the temperature $T$ after $t$ minutes.
d) Use your equation to predict the temperature after 7 minutes.

### Homework 3: Finding Equation from Data (从数据求方程)
A taxi company charges a fixed fee plus a charge per kilometer. The table shows the cost for different distances:

| Distance (km) | Cost ($) |
|---------------|----------|
| 2             | 8        |
| 5             | 17       |

a) Find the fixed fee (y-intercept).
b) Find the charge per kilometer (gradient).
c) Write the equation relating cost ($C$) to distance ($d$).

### Homework 4: Real-life Application - Water Tank (实际应用 - 水箱)
A water tank is being filled at a constant rate. After 5 minutes, it contains 30 liters of water. After 12 minutes, it contains 71 liters of water. Assume the tank was empty initially.
a) Find the rate at which the tank is being filled (liters per minute).
b) Write an equation for the volume of water ($V$) in the tank after $t$ minutes.
c) How much water will be in the tank after 20 minutes?

learning_objectives.objective: Draw linear graphs from given data or a given equation. 从给定数据或给定方程绘制线性图像。
Find the gradient, intercept, and equation of a linear graph. 找到线性图像的斜率、截距和方程。
Interpret and use a variety of linear graphs such as currency conversion graphs. 解释并使用各种线性图像，如货币转换图。

sub_units.title: Linear Graphs 线性图形
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Distance between Two Points (两点间距离)\nCalculate the length of the line segment connecting the points $A(1, 2)$ and $B(4, 6)$.

### Exercise 2: Midpoint of a Line Segment (线段中点)\nFind the coordinates of the midpoint of the line segment with endpoints $P(-3, 5)$ and $Q(7, -1)$.

### Exercise 3: Parallel Lines (平行线)\nFind the equation of a line that is parallel to $y = 2x + 3$ and passes through the point $(1, 5)$.

### Exercise 4: Perpendicular Lines (垂直线)\nFind the equation of a line that is perpendicular to $y = -\frac{1}{3}x + 2$ and passes through the point $(4, 1)$.

### Exercise 5: Identifying Parallel and Perpendicular Lines (识别平行线和垂直线)\nDetermine whether the following pairs of lines are parallel, perpendicular, or neither:\na) Line 1: $y = 4x - 1$
   Line 2: $y = 4x + 5$\nb) Line 1: $y = 2x + 7$
   Line 2: $y = -\frac{1}{2}x - 3$\nc) Line 1: $y = 3x + 2$
   Line 2: $y = -3x + 2$

### Exercise 6: Combined Problem (综合问题)\nGiven points $A(2, 3)$ and $B(6, 9)$:\na) Calculate the length of the line segment $AB$.\nb) Find the coordinates of the midpoint of $AB$.\nc) Find the equation of the line that is perpendicular to $AB$ and passes through the midpoint of $AB$. (This is called the perpendicular bisector).
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Distance and Midpoint (距离与中点)
Given points $C(-5, -2)$ and $D(3, 4)$:
a) Calculate the exact length of the line segment $CD$.
b) Find the coordinates of the midpoint of $CD$.

### Homework 2: Parallel Line Equation (平行线方程)
A line $L_1$ has the equation $2x + 3y = 6$. Find the equation of a line $L_2$ that is parallel to $L_1$ and passes through the point $(-1, 4)$.

### Homework 3: Perpendicular Line Equation (垂直线方程)
Find the equation of a line that is perpendicular to the line passing through points $(2, 5)$ and $(6, 3)$, and also passes through the point $(1, 1)$.

### Homework 4: Geometric Application (几何应用)
The vertices of a quadrilateral are $A(1, 2)$, $B(4, 2)$, $C(4, 5)$, and $D(1, 5)$.
a) Show that $AB$ is parallel to $DC$.
b) Show that $AD$ is perpendicular to $AB$.
c) What type of quadrilateral is $ABCD$?

### Homework 5: Perpendicular Bisector (垂直平分线)
Find the equation of the perpendicular bisector of the line segment joining $P( -2, 6)$ and $Q(4, 2)$.

learning_objectives.objective: Calculate the length and the mid-points of a line segment given the coordinates of the endpoints. 计算给定端点坐标的线段的长度和中点。
Identify the equations of parallel and perpendicular lines to a given linear function (and/or given co-ordinates). 确定与给定线性函数（或给定坐标）平行和垂直的直线方程。

sub_units.title: Recap 回顾
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Identifying Proportion (识别比例关系)\nFor each table, determine if $y$ is directly proportional to $x$, inversely proportional to $x$, or neither.
\na) | $x$ | $y$ |
   |---|---|
   | 2 | 10 |
   | 3 | 15 |
   | 5 | 25 |
\nb) | $x$ | $y$ |
   |---|---|
   | 1 | 12 |
   | 2 | 6  |
   | 3 | 4  |
\nc) | $x$ | $y$ |
   |---|---|
   | 1 | 3  |
   | 2 | 5  |
   | 3 | 7  |

### Exercise 2: Direct Proportion Equation (正比例方程)\nIf $y$ is directly proportional to $x$, and $y = 18$ when $x = 3$, find:\na) The constant of proportionality, $k$.\nb) The equation relating $y$ and $x$.\nc) The value of $y$ when $x = 7$.

### Exercise 3: Inverse Proportion Equation (反比例方程)\nIf $P$ is inversely proportional to $Q$, and $P = 4$ when $Q = 6$, find:\na) The constant of proportionality, $k$.\nb) The equation relating $P$ and $Q$.\nc) The value of $P$ when $Q = 8$.

### Exercise 4: Real-life Direct Proportion (实际正比例)\nThe cost of apples is directly proportional to their weight. If 2 kg of apples cost $5, how much would 3.5 kg of apples cost?

### Exercise 5: Real-life Inverse Proportion (实际反比例)\nThe time taken to complete a task is inversely proportional to the number of workers. If 4 workers can complete a task in 6 hours, how long would it take 3 workers to complete the same task?
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Mixed Proportion Problems (混合比例问题)
a) $A$ is directly proportional to $B$. If $A = 24$ when $B = 8$, find $A$ when $B = 15$.
b) $C$ is inversely proportional to $D$. If $C = 5$ when $D = 10$, find $C$ when $D = 25$.

### Homework 2: Graphing Proportion (比例图示)
Sketch the general shape of the graph for:
a) Direct proportion ($y = kx$, where $k > 0$)
b) Inverse proportion ($y =  rac{k}{x}$, where $k > 0$)

### Homework 3: Real-life Application - Speed and Time (实际应用 - 速度与时间)
The time ($T$) it takes to travel a certain distance is inversely proportional to the average speed ($S$). If it takes 3 hours to travel a distance at an average speed of 80 km/h, how long would it take to travel the same distance at an average speed of 60 km/h?

### Homework 4: Real-life Application - Area of a Circle (实际应用 - 圆的面积)
The area ($A$) of a circle is directly proportional to the square of its radius ($r$). If a circle with a radius of 3 cm has an area of $9\pi 	ext{ cm}^2$, what is the area of a circle with a radius of 5 cm?

### Homework 5: Identifying and Solving (识别与求解)
For each scenario, state whether it represents direct or inverse proportion, then solve the problem:
a) The number of pizzas needed for a party is proportional to the number of guests. If 5 pizzas are enough for 10 guests, how many pizzas are needed for 24 guests?
b) The intensity of light ($I$) from a source is inversely proportional to the square of the distance ($d$) from the source. If the intensity is 100 units at a distance of 2 meters, what is the intensity at a distance of 5 meters?

learning_objectives.objective: Direct and inverse proportion. 正和反比例。
Real-life examples of direct and inverse proportion. 正和反比例的实际例子。

sub_units.title: Introduction to Functions 函数介绍
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Identifying Functions (识别函数)
Determine if each relation is a function. Explain your reasoning.
a) Input: Student ID, Output: Student Name
b) Input: Student Name, Output: Student ID
c) Input: Number, Output: Its square root
d) Input: $x$, Output: $y$ where $y = x^2$

### Exercise 2: Evaluating Functions (函数求值)
Given the function $f(x) = 2x + 5$, find:
a) $f(3)$
b) $f(-1)$
c) $f(0)$

### Exercise 3: Numerical Representation (数值表示)
Complete the table of values for the function $g(x) = x^2 - 1$.

| $x$ | $g(x)$ |
|-----|--------|
| -2  |        |
| -1  |        |
| 0   |        |
| 1   |        |
| 2   |        |

### Exercise 4: Real-life Function (实际函数)
The cost $C$ (in dollars) of producing $n$ items is given by the function $C(n) = 10n + 50$.
a) What is the cost of producing 10 items?
b) What does the '50' represent in this context?

### Exercise 5: Direct and Inverse Proportion as Functions (正反比例作为函数)
a) Write the equation for direct proportion where the constant of proportionality is 3, using function notation.
b) Write the equation for inverse proportion where the constant of proportionality is 10, using function notation.

### Exercise 6: Matching Graphs (匹配图形)
Match the following function types to their general graph shapes (no need to draw, just describe or name the shape):
a) $y = ax + b$ (linear)
b) $y = ax^2 + bx + c$ (quadratic)
c) $y = ax^3 + bx^2 + cx + d$ (cubic)
d) $y =  rac{a}{x}$ (reciprocal)
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Function Evaluation (函数求值)
Given the function $h(x) = x^2 - 3x + 2$, find:
a) $h(0)$
b) $h(2)$
c) $h(-3)$

### Homework 2: Table of Values (数值表)
Create a table of values for the function $f(x) = 2^x$ for $x = -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3$.

### Homework 3: Identifying Graph Types (识别图形类型)
Describe the general shape of the graph for each function type:
a) $y = 5x - 2$
b) $y = x^2 + 4$
c) $y =  rac{3}{x}$
d) $y = x^3 - 2x$

### Homework 4: Real-life Function Application (实际函数应用)
The area $A$ of a square is a function of its side length $s$. 
a) Write this relationship using function notation, $A(s)$.
b) What is the domain of this function in a real-world context?
c) If the side length is 7 cm, what is the area?

### Homework 5: Function Definition and Domain/Range (函数定义与定义域/值域)
Consider the function $f(x) =  rac{1}{x-2}$.
a) What value(s) of $x$ are not allowed in the domain of this function?
b) If the domain is all real numbers except the value(s) found in (a), describe the range of this function.

learning_objectives.objective: Understand the meaning of Functions and investigate real-life and cross-curricular links with functions. 理解函数的含义，并调查函数的实际和跨学科联系。
Understand the equations of direct and inverse proportion (as functions of x) and the graphical representation of these. 理解正和反比例的方程（作为x的函数）及其图形表示。
Represent functions in different ways: algebraically, graphically, and numerically. Introduce the notation of functions. 以不同方式表示函数：代数、图形和数值。介绍函数的符号。
Be able to identify visually a variety of graphs of such as basic quadratics, cubic, 1/x,ax etc. (do not need to be able to plot them). 能够直观地识别各种函数图形，如基本二次函数、立方函数、1/x，ax等（不需要能够绘制它们）。

sub_units.title: Distance-time and Speed-time graphs 距离-时间和速度-时间图
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Interpreting Distance-Time Graph (解释距离-时间图)\nThe graph shows a person's journey. Describe what is happening in each segment (A, B, C).

(Imagine a distance-time graph: A is increasing slope, B is horizontal, C is increasing slope but steeper than A)

### Exercise 2: Calculating Speed from Distance-Time Graph (从距离-时间图计算速度)\nFrom the graph in Exercise 1:\na) Calculate the speed during segment A.\nb) Calculate the speed during segment C.

### Exercise 3: Interpreting Speed-Time Graph (解释速度-时间图)\nThe graph shows a car's speed over time. Describe what is happening in each segment (P, Q, R).

(Imagine a speed-time graph: P is increasing slope, Q is horizontal, R is decreasing slope)

### Exercise 4: Calculating Acceleration from Speed-Time Graph (从速度-时间图计算加速度)\nFrom the graph in Exercise 3:\na) Calculate the acceleration during segment P.\nb) Calculate the acceleration during segment R.

### Exercise 5: Distance from Speed-Time Graph (从速度-时间图计算距离)\nCalculate the total distance travelled for the journey represented by the speed-time graph below:

(Imagine a speed-time graph: starts at (0,0), goes to (5, 10) linearly, then horizontal to (10, 10), then down to (15, 0) linearly)

### Exercise 6: Average Speed (平均速度)\nA car travels 120 km in 2 hours, then stops for 30 minutes, and then travels another 90 km in 1.5 hours.\na) Draw a distance-time graph for this journey.\nb) Calculate the average speed for the entire journey.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Detailed Distance-Time Analysis (详细距离-时间分析)
A cyclist's journey is shown on a distance-time graph.

(Imagine a distance-time graph: (0,0) to (1, 20) linearly, then (1, 20) to (2, 20) horizontally, then (2, 20) to (3.5, 50) linearly)

a) What is the speed of the cyclist during the first hour?
b) How long did the cyclist stop for?
c) What was the speed of the cyclist during the last part of the journey?
d) Calculate the average speed for the entire 3.5-hour journey.

### Homework 2: Speed-Time Graph Calculations (速度-时间图计算)
Consider a speed-time graph where a train accelerates uniformly from rest to 30 m/s in 10 seconds, then travels at a constant speed for 20 seconds, and finally decelerates uniformly to rest in 5 seconds.
a) Calculate the acceleration during the first 10 seconds.
b) Calculate the deceleration during the last 5 seconds.
c) Calculate the total distance travelled by the train.

### Homework 3: Real-life Scenario - Car Journey (实际场景 - 汽车旅程)
A car starts from rest and accelerates at $2 	ext{ m/s}^2$ for 5 seconds. It then maintains a constant speed for 15 seconds before decelerating uniformly to rest in 10 seconds.
a) Draw a speed-time graph for this journey.
b) Calculate the maximum speed reached by the car.
c) Calculate the total distance travelled.

### Homework 4: Comparing Journeys (比较旅程)
Journey A: A person walks 3 km in 40 minutes, then rests for 10 minutes, then walks another 2 km in 25 minutes.
Journey B: A person cycles 10 km in 1 hour, then rests for 15 minutes, then cycles another 5 km in 30 minutes.

a) For Journey A, calculate the average speed in km/h for the entire journey.
b) For Journey B, calculate the average speed in km/h for the entire journey.
c) Which journey had a higher average speed?

### Homework 5: Interpreting Complex Motion (解释复杂运动)
Describe the motion of an object whose speed-time graph is a triangle (starts at (0,0), goes to (t1, v_max) linearly, then back to (t2, 0) linearly). What does the area under this graph represent?

learning_objectives.objective: Apply the idea of rates of change to simple kinematics involving distance-time and speed-time graphs. 将变化率的概念应用于涉及距离-时间和速度-时间图的简单运动学。
Understand gradients representing acceleration and deceleration and be able to calculate the distance travelled as area under a speed-time graph. 理解代表加速度和减速度的斜率，并能够计算速度-时间图下的面积表示的距离。
Calculate the average speeds of parts or a whole distance-time graph. 计算距离-时间图的部分或整体的平均速度。

teachingUnits.title: Mastery of Angles 掌握角度
learning_objectives: Sum of angles rules for triangles, quadrilaterals. 三角形和四边形的角度和规则。
Angles on a straight line and around a point. 直线和点周围的角度。
Identify the properties of all triangle types (isosceles, equilateral etc). 识别所有类型三角形的性质（等腰、等边等）。

To master the proof that the sum of angles in a triangle is equal to 180 and that the exterior angle of a triangle is equal to the sum of the two, opposite, interior angles. 掌握证明三角形内角和等于180度的证明，以及三角形的外角等于两个相对内角之和的证明。
Be able to find the sum of interior angles of polygons by using the interior angle sum formula. 能够使用内角和公式找到多边形的内角和。
Be able to find exterior angles of regular polygons. 能够找到正多边形的外角。
Be able to find the sides of polygons given either the sum of the interior angles of the polygon, or each interior / exterior angle of a regular polygon, etc. 能够在已知多边形的内角和或正多边形的每个内/外角的情况下找到多边形的边数等。

sub_units.title: Recap 回顾
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Classroom Exercise 1\nFind the value of $x$ in the following diagrams.

(a) An angle on a straight line is $110^\circ$. What is the adjacent angle $x$? (直线上的一个角是 $110^\circ$。相邻的角 $x$ 是多少？)

(b) Angles around a point are $90^\circ$, $120^\circ$, and $x$. (绕一点的角度是 $90^\circ$, $120^\circ$ 和 $x$。)

### Classroom Exercise 2\nA triangle has angles $50^\circ$, $70^\circ$, and $x$. Find $x$. (一个三角形有 $50^\circ$, $70^\circ$ 和 $x$ 三个角。求 $x$。)

### Classroom Exercise 3\nIdentify the type of triangle based on its properties:

(a) All three sides are equal. (三条边都相等。)

(b) Two sides are equal, and the angles opposite these sides are equal. (两条边相等，且这些边所对的角相等。)

(c) One angle is $90^\circ$. (一个角是 $90^\circ$。)

### Classroom Exercise 4\nA quadrilateral has interior angles $85^\circ$, $100^\circ$, $115^\circ$, and $x$. Calculate the value of $x$. (一个四边形的内角是 $85^\circ$, $100^\circ$, $115^\circ$ 和 $x$。计算 $x$ 的值。)

### Classroom Exercise 5\nIn the diagram below, $ABC$ is a straight line. $\angle ABD = 65^\circ$ and $\triangle BDE$ is an isosceles triangle with $BD = BE$. Find $\angle BED$ and $\angle CBE$.

(a) Find $\angle CBE$.

(b) Find $\angle BED$.

(c) Find $\angle BDE$.

(d) Find $\angle DBE$.

(e) Find $\angle ADE$.

(Assume a diagram where A-B-C is a straight line, D is above B, E is to the right of D, forming triangle BDE.)

### Classroom Exercise 6\nAn isosceles triangle has one angle measuring $40^\circ$. What are the possible values for the other two angles? (一个等腰三角形有一个角是 $40^\circ$。其他两个角可能的度数是多少？)

### Classroom Exercise 7\nTwo angles of a triangle are in the ratio $2:3$. The third angle is $70^\circ$. Find the measures of the other two angles. (一个三角形的两个角之比是 $2:3$。第三个角是 $70^\circ$。求另外两个角的度数。)
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nDetermine the value of the unknown angles in each of the following figures. Show your working clearly.

(a) A straight line is divided into three angles: $2x$, $3x$, and $4x$. Find $x$. (一条直线被分成三个角：$2x$, $3x$ 和 $4x$。求 $x$。)

(b) Angles around a point are $x$, $2x$, $3x$, and $4x$. Find $x$. (绕一点的角度是 $x$, $2x$, $3x$ 和 $4x$。求 $x$。)

### Homework 2\nIn $\triangle PQR$, $\angle P = (2x+10)^\circ$, $\angle Q = (3x-5)^\circ$, and $\angle R = (x+15)^\circ$. Find the value of $x$ and the measure of each angle. (在 $\triangle PQR$ 中，$\angle P = (2x+10)^\circ$，$\angle Q = (3x-5)^\circ$，$\angle R = (x+15)^\circ$。求 $x$ 的值和每个角的度数。)

### Homework 3\nConsider a quadrilateral $ABCD$ where $\angle A = 90^\circ$, $\angle B = 110^\circ$, and $\angle C = 75^\circ$. Find $\angle D$. If this quadrilateral were part of a larger design, how would knowing its angles help in construction? (考虑一个四边形 $ABCD$，其中 $\angle A = 90^\circ$，$\angle B = 110^\circ$，$\angle C = 75^\circ$。求 $\angle D$。如果这个四边形是一个更大设计的一部分，了解它的角度将如何帮助施工？)

### Homework 4\nAn isosceles triangle has a perimeter of $20$ cm. One of its equal sides is $7$ cm. What is the length of the third side? Can you determine the angles of this triangle if the base angles are twice the vertex angle? (一个等腰三角形的周长是 $20$ 厘米。其中一条等边是 $7$ 厘米。第三条边的长度是多少？如果底角是顶角的两倍，你能确定这个三角形的角度吗？)

### Homework 5\nIn the figure below, $AB$ is parallel to $CD$. $EF$ is a transversal. $\angle AEF = (3x+20)^\circ$ and $\angle EFD = (5x-10)^\circ$. Find the value of $x$. (Assume a diagram with parallel lines AB and CD, and transversal EF. $\angle AEF$ and $\angle EFD$ are consecutive interior angles.)

(a) What is the relationship between $\angle AEF$ and $\angle EFD$?

(b) Set up an equation and solve for $x$.

(c) Calculate the measure of $\angle AEF$ and $\angle EFD$.

learning_objectives.objective: Sum of angles rules for triangles, quadrilaterals. 三角形和四边形的角度和规则。
Angles on a straight line and around a point. 直线和点周围的角度。
Identify the properties of all triangle types (isosceles, equilateral etc). 识别所有类型三角形的性质（等腰、等边等）。

sub_units.title: Proof 证明
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Classroom Exercise 1\nState the theorem for the sum of angles in a triangle. (陈述三角形内角和定理。)

### Classroom Exercise 2\nComplete the proof that the sum of angles in a triangle is $180^\circ$.
\nGiven: $\triangle ABC$\nTo Prove: $\angle A + \angle B + \angle C = 180^\circ$
\nConstruction: Draw a line $DE$ through $A$ parallel to $BC$.

| Statement (陈述) | Reason (理由) |
|---|---|
| 1. $DE \parallel BC$ | Construction (作图) |
| 2. $\angle DAB = \angle ABC$ | (a) ______ |
| 3. $\angle EAC = \angle ACB$ | (b) ______ |
| 4. $\angle DAB + \angle BAC + \angle CAE = 180^\circ$ | (c) ______ |
| 5. $\angle ABC + \angle BAC + \angle ACB = 180^\circ$ | (d) ______ |

### Classroom Exercise 3\nState the theorem for the exterior angle of a triangle. (陈述三角形外角定理。)

### Classroom Exercise 4\nIn $\triangle PQR$, the exterior angle at $R$ is $130^\circ$. If $\angle P = 60^\circ$, find $\angle Q$. (在 $\triangle PQR$ 中，R 处的外角是 $130^\circ$。如果 $\angle P = 60^\circ$，求 $\angle Q$。)

### Classroom Exercise 5\nProve that the exterior angle of a triangle is equal to the sum of the two opposite interior angles.
\nGiven: $\triangle ABC$ with side $BC$ extended to $D$.\nTo Prove: $\angle ACD = \angle BAC + \angle ABC$

| Statement (陈述) | Reason (理由) |
|---|---|
| 1. $\angle BAC + \angle ABC + \angle ACB = 180^\circ$ | (a) ______ |
| 2. $\angle ACB + \angle ACD = 180^\circ$ | (b) ______ |
| 3. $\angle BAC + \angle ABC + \angle ACB = \angle ACB + \angle ACD$ | (c) ______ |
| 4. $\angle BAC + \angle ABC = \angle ACD$ | (d) ______ |

### Classroom Exercise 6\nIn the figure, $AB \parallel CD$. Find the value of $x$ and $y$. (Assume a diagram with parallel lines AB and CD, and a transversal intersecting them, forming a triangle with one vertex on AB and two on CD. Let one angle be $y$, another be $x$, and an exterior angle be given.)

(a) Identify any alternate interior angles or corresponding angles.

(b) Use the exterior angle theorem or sum of angles in a triangle to find $x$ and $y$.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nDraw a diagram and write down the full proof for the theorem that the sum of angles in a triangle is $180^\circ$. Include all statements and reasons. (画图并写出三角形内角和为 $180^\circ$ 的完整证明。包括所有陈述和理由。)

### Homework 2\nDraw a diagram and write down the full proof for the theorem that the exterior angle of a triangle is equal to the sum of the two opposite interior angles. Include all statements and reasons. (画图并写出三角形外角等于两个相对内角之和的完整证明。包括所有陈述和理由。)

### Homework 3\nIn $\triangle XYZ$, $\angle X = (2a)^\circ$, $\angle Y = (3a-10)^\circ$. The exterior angle at $Z$ is $115^\circ$. Find the value of $a$ and the measure of each interior angle of the triangle. (在 $\triangle XYZ$ 中，$\angle X = (2a)^\circ$，$\angle Y = (3a-10)^\circ$。Z 处的外角是 $115^\circ$。求 $a$ 的值和三角形每个内角的度数。)

### Homework 4\nConsider a triangular roof truss design. If one of the base angles is $55^\circ$ and the exterior angle at the other base is $125^\circ$, prove that the roof truss forms an isosceles triangle. (考虑一个三角形屋顶桁架设计。如果一个底角是 $55^\circ$，另一个底角的外角是 $125^\circ$，证明屋顶桁架形成一个等腰三角形。)

### Homework 5\nIn the given figure, $PQ \parallel RS$. $T$ is a point such that $\angle QPT = 40^\circ$ and $\angle RTS = 75^\circ$. Find $\angle PTR$. (Assume a diagram where PQ is parallel to RS. PT and RT are transversals forming a triangle PTR, with QPT and RTS being angles related to the parallel lines.)

(a) Identify angles related by parallel lines.

(b) Use angle properties to find $\angle PRT$.

(c) Use the sum of angles in a triangle to find $\angle PTR$.

learning_objectives.objective: To master the proof that the sum of angles in a triangle is equal to 180 and that the exterior angle of a triangle is equal to the sum of the two, opposite, interior angles. 掌握证明三角形内角和等于180度的证明，以及三角形的外角等于两个相对内角之和的证明。

sub_units.title: Interior and Exterior Angles Rules 内角和外角规则
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Classroom Exercise 1\nCalculate the sum of the interior angles for the following polygons:

(a) A pentagon (五边形)

(b) A heptagon (七边形)

(c) A polygon with 12 sides (一个有12条边的多边形)

### Classroom Exercise 2\nFind the measure of each exterior angle of a regular:

(a) Hexagon (正六边形)

(b) Octagon (正八边形)

(c) 15-sided polygon (正十五边形)

### Classroom Exercise 3\nFind the measure of each interior angle of a regular:

(a) Quadrilateral (正四边形)

(b) Nonagon (正九边形)

(c) 20-sided polygon (正二十边形)

### Classroom Exercise 4\nThe sum of the interior angles of a polygon is $1440^\circ$. How many sides does the polygon have? (一个多边形的内角和是 $1440^\circ$。这个多边形有多少条边？)

### Classroom Exercise 5\nEach exterior angle of a regular polygon is $30^\circ$. How many sides does the polygon have? (一个正多边形的每个外角是 $30^\circ$。这个多边形有多少条边？)

### Classroom Exercise 6\nEach interior angle of a regular polygon is $150^\circ$. How many sides does the polygon have? (一个正多边形的每个内角是 $150^\circ$。这个多边形有多少条边？)

### Classroom Exercise 7\nAn irregular pentagon has interior angles $100^\circ$, $110^\circ$, $120^\circ$, $95^\circ$, and $x$. Find the value of $x$. (一个不规则五边形的内角是 $100^\circ$, $110^\circ$, $120^\circ$, $95^\circ$ 和 $x$。求 $x$ 的值。)

### Classroom Exercise 8\nCan a regular polygon have an exterior angle of $25^\circ$? Explain your answer. (一个正多边形的外角可以是 $25^\circ$ 吗？解释你的答案。)
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nCalculate the sum of the interior angles of a regular 18-sided polygon. Then, find the measure of each interior angle and each exterior angle. (计算一个正18边形的内角和。然后，求每个内角和每个外角的度数。)

### Homework 2\nThe sum of the interior angles of a polygon is $2340^\circ$. Determine the number of sides of this polygon. (一个多边形的内角和是 $2340^\circ$。确定这个多边形的边数。)

### Homework 3\nIf each interior angle of a regular polygon is $162^\circ$, how many sides does the polygon have? (如果一个正多边形的每个内角是 $162^\circ$，这个多边形有多少条边？)

### Homework 4\nThree interior angles of a hexagon are $110^\circ$, $120^\circ$, and $130^\circ$. The remaining three interior angles are equal. Find the measure of each of the equal angles. (一个六边形的三个内角是 $110^\circ$, $120^\circ$ 和 $130^\circ$。剩下的三个内角相等。求每个相等角的度数。)

### Homework 5\nA designer is creating a pattern using regular polygons that fit together without gaps. If one of the polygons is a regular octagon, what other regular polygons could potentially fit around a common vertex with it? Explain your reasoning using angle properties. (一位设计师正在使用正多边形创建一种无缝拼接的图案。如果其中一个多边形是正八边形，还有哪些其他正多边形可以与它围绕一个共同顶点拼接？使用角度性质解释你的推理。)

### Homework 6\nIs it possible for a regular polygon to have an interior angle that is $10$ times its exterior angle? If so, what is the name of this polygon? (一个正多边形的内角可能是其外角的 $10$ 倍吗？如果可能，这个多边形叫什么名字？)

learning_objectives.objective: Be able to find the sum of interior angles of polygons by using the interior angle sum formula. 能够使用内角和公式找到多边形的内角和。
Be able to find exterior angles of regular polygons. 能够找到正多边形的外角。
Be able to find the sides of polygons given either the sum of the interior angles of the polygon, or each interior / exterior angle of a regular polygon, etc. 能够在已知多边形的内角和或正多边形的每个内/外角的情况下找到多边形的边数等。

teachingUnits.title: Pythagoras Theorem 勾股定理
learning_objectives: Recall that the hypotenuse in a right-angled triangle is always the longest side and opposite the right angle. 回忆直角三角形中斜边始终是最长边，并且在直角对面。
Explore the process of finding Pythagoras’ Theorem and prove the Pythagorean theorem using practical techniques. 探索找到勾股定理的过程，并使用实际技巧证明勾股定理。
Understand and use Pythagoras’ theorem to solve two-dimensional problems involving right-angled triangles. 理解并使用勾股定理解决涉及直角三角形的二维问题。
Be able to find the missing sides of a right-angled triangle. And master Pythagoras’ theorem to solve a variety of practical problems. 能够找到直角三角形的缺失边长，并掌握勾股定理来解决各种实际问题。
Understand the concepts of converse propositions and converse theorems. 理解逆命题和逆定理的概念。

sub_units.title: Pythagoras’ theorem 勾股定理
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1 (Easy)\nFind the length of the hypotenuse $c$ in a right-angled triangle with legs $a = 6$ cm and $b = 8$ cm.
在一个直角三角形中，已知两条直角边 $a = 6$ 厘米和 $b = 8$ 厘米，求斜边 $c$ 的长度。

### Exercise 2 (Easy)\nA right-angled triangle has a hypotenuse of 15 cm and one leg of 9 cm. Find the length of the other leg.
一个直角三角形的斜边长 15 厘米，一条直角边长 9 厘米。求另一条直角边的长度。

### Exercise 3 (Medium)\nA ladder 5 meters long is leaning against a wall. The base of the ladder is 3 meters away from the wall. How high up the wall does the ladder reach?
一把 5 米长的梯子靠在墙上。梯子的底部距离墙壁 3 米。梯子能达到墙壁多高？

### Exercise 4 (Medium - Converse)\nDetermine if a triangle with side lengths 7 cm, 24 cm, and 25 cm is a right-angled triangle. Justify your answer.
判断一个边长分别为 7 厘米、24 厘米和 25 厘米的三角形是否为直角三角形。请说明理由。

### Exercise 5 (Medium)\nCalculate the length of the diagonal of a rectangle with sides 10 cm and 24 cm.
计算一个长为 24 厘米、宽为 10 厘米的矩形的对角线长度。

### Exercise 6 (Challenging - Multi-step)\nAn isosceles triangle has two equal sides of 13 cm and a base of 10 cm. Find the height of the triangle and then calculate its area.
一个等腰三角形的两条等边长 13 厘米，底边长 10 厘米。求三角形的高度，然后计算其面积。
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nA television screen is advertised by the length of its diagonal. If a TV screen has a width of 40 inches and a height of 30 inches, what is the diagonal length of the screen?
电视屏幕的尺寸通常以其对角线长度来宣传。如果一台电视屏幕的宽度是 40 英寸，高度是 30 英寸，那么屏幕的对角线长度是多少？

### Homework 2\nFind the missing side $x$ in a right-angled triangle where one leg is 7 cm and the hypotenuse is 11 cm. Round your answer to two decimal places if necessary.
在一个直角三角形中，已知一条直角边为 7 厘米，斜边为 11 厘米。求另一条直角边 $x$ 的长度。如果需要，将答案四舍五入到两位小数。

### Homework 3 (Converse)\nThe sides of a triangle are 8 cm, 15 cm, and 17 cm. Is this a right-angled triangle? Show your working.
一个三角形的边长分别为 8 厘米、15 厘米和 17 厘米。这个三角形是直角三角形吗？请展示你的计算过程。

### Homework 4 (Real-life Application)\nA boat leaves port and sails 12 km due east, then turns and sails 9 km due north. How far is the boat from the port?
一艘船从港口出发，向正东方向航行 12 公里，然后转向正北方向航行 9 公里。此时船距离港口有多远？

### Homework 5 (Challenging - Multi-step)\nA square park has a diagonal path of length 100 meters.\na) Find the length of one side of the park. Round to one decimal place.\nb) Calculate the perimeter of the park.
一个正方形公园有一条长 100 米的对角线小径。\na) 求公园一边的长度。四舍五入到一位小数。\nb) 计算公园的周长。

learning_objectives.objective: Recall that the hypotenuse in a right-angled triangle is always the longest side and opposite the right angle. 回忆直角三角形中斜边始终是最长边，并且在直角对面。
Explore the process of finding Pythagoras’ Theorem and prove the Pythagorean theorem using practical techniques. 探索找到勾股定理的过程，并使用实际技巧证明勾股定理。
Understand and use Pythagoras’ theorem to solve two-dimensional problems involving right-angled triangles. 理解并使用勾股定理解决涉及直角三角形的二维问题。
Be able to find the missing sides of a right-angled triangle. And master Pythagoras’ theorem to solve a variety of practical problems. 能够找到直角三角形的缺失边长，并掌握勾股定理来解决各种实际问题。
Understand the concepts of converse propositions and converse theorems. 理解逆命题和逆定理的概念。

teachingUnits.title: 2D Shape 二维图形
learning_objectives: Recall the names and properties of basic 2D shape, with a focus upon the varying quadrilaterals. 回忆基本二维图形的名称和性质，特别是不同的四边形。
Use properties of quadrilaterals to find missing angles or sides. 使用四边形的性质找到缺失的角度或边长。
Use the perpendicular bisector to find the minimal distance between two parallel lines. 使用垂直平分线找到两条平行线之间的最短距离。
Calculate the area and perimeter for 2D shape, with a focus upon quadrilaterals. Find the areas of complex compound shapes. 计算二维图形的面积和周长，特别是四边形。找到复杂复合图形的面积。
Explore and prove the property, decision (parallelogram, rectangle, rhombus and square) and median line theories.
Identify lines of symmetry of 2D solids along with the order of rotational symmetry. 探索并证明属性决定（平行四边形、矩形、菱形和正方形）和中位线理论。
To recognize and appreciate rotational and reflective symmetry in real-life, in art for example. 识别二维固体的对称轴以及旋转对称的顺序。
[Optional] Tessellations of 2D patterns. Understand why some 2D shapes and patterns will tesselate while other will not. 二维图形的镶嵌。理解为什么某些二维图形和图案可以镶嵌，而其他的不可以。
[Optional] Investigate tessellation in real-life (art, flooring, pavements etc.). 调查实际生活中的镶嵌（艺术、地板、铺路等）。

sub_units.title: Recall 回顾
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Identify the Shapes (识别图形)\nIdentify the following quadrilaterals based on their properties:
\na) A quadrilateral with four equal sides and four right angles.
\nb) A quadrilateral with opposite sides parallel and equal, but no right angles.
\nc) A quadrilateral with exactly one pair of parallel sides.

### Exercise 2: Properties of a Rectangle (长方形的性质)\nState three key properties of a rectangle. (说出长方形的三个主要性质。)

### Exercise 3: Missing Angles in a Parallelogram (平行四边形中的缺失角)\nIn parallelogram ABCD, $\angle A = 70^\circ$. Find the measures of $\angle B$, $\angle C$, and $\angle D$.

### Exercise 4: Missing Side Lengths in a Rhombus (菱形中的缺失边长)\nA rhombus has a perimeter of 36 cm. What is the length of each side? (一个菱形的周长是36厘米，每条边的长度是多少？)

### Exercise 5: Trapezium Angles (梯形角度)\nTrapezium PQRS has PQ parallel to SR. If $\angle P = 110^\circ$ and $\angle Q = 80^\circ$, find $\angle S$ and $\angle R$.

### Exercise 6: True or False (判断正误)\nDetermine whether the following statements are true or false. Justify your answer.
\na) All squares are rectangles.
\nb) All parallelograms are rhombuses.
\nc) A kite is always a parallelogram.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Kite Properties (风筝形的性质)\nIn a kite ABCD, AB = AD and CB = CD. If $\angle BCD = 100^\circ$ and $\angle ADC = 120^\circ$, find $\angle ABC$ and $\angle BAD$.

### Homework 2: Combined Quadrilateral (组合四边形)\nConsider a figure formed by a square attached to an equilateral triangle. If the side length of the square is 5 cm, what is the perimeter of the entire compound shape?

### Homework 3: Quadrilateral Classification (四边形分类)\nExplain why a square can be classified as a rectangle, a rhombus, and a parallelogram. (解释为什么正方形可以被归类为长方形、菱形和平行四边形。)

### Homework 4: Real-Life Application (实际应用)\nA garden bed is shaped like a parallelogram with side lengths of 8 meters and 5 meters. If one of its interior angles is $60^\circ$, what are the measures of the other three interior angles?

### Homework 5: Advanced Angle Problem (进阶角度问题)\nIn a trapezium ABCD, AB is parallel to DC. The non-parallel sides are AD and BC. If $\angle A = (3x - 10)^\circ$ and $\angle D = (2x + 30)^\circ$, find the value of $x$. (Hint: What is the relationship between consecutive angles between parallel lines?)

learning_objectives.objective: Recall the names and properties of basic 2D shape, with a focus upon the varying quadrilaterals. 回忆基本二维图形的名称和性质，特别是不同的四边形。
Use properties of quadrilaterals to find missing angles or sides. 使用四边形的性质找到缺失的角度或边长。

sub_units.title: 2D Shape 二维图形
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Perpendicular Bisector (垂直平分线)\nDraw a line segment AB of length 8 cm. Construct its perpendicular bisector using a compass and ruler. (画一条8厘米长的线段AB。使用圆规和直尺画出它的垂直平分线。)

### Exercise 2: Area and Perimeter of a Parallelogram (平行四边形的面积和周长)\nA parallelogram has a base of 12 cm and a height of 7 cm. One of its non-perpendicular sides is 8 cm. Calculate its area and perimeter.

### Exercise 3: Area of a Trapezium (梯形的面积)\nCalculate the area of a trapezium with parallel sides of length 10 cm and 16 cm, and a perpendicular height of 5 cm.

### Exercise 4: Area of a Compound Shape (复合图形的面积)\nA shape is made up of a rectangle (length 10m, width 4m) and a semi-circle attached to one of its 4m sides. Calculate the total area of the compound shape. (Use $\pi \approx 3.14$)

### Exercise 5: Symmetry of a Regular Hexagon (正六边形的对称性)\nFor a regular hexagon, state the number of lines of symmetry and its order of rotational symmetry. (对于一个正六边形，说出它的对称轴数量和旋转对称阶数。)

### Exercise 6: Median Line Theorem (中位线定理)\nIn trapezium ABCD, AB is parallel to DC. M and N are the midpoints of AD and BC respectively. If AB = 8 cm and DC = 14 cm, find the length of the median line MN.

### Exercise 7: Proving Parallelogram Properties (证明平行四边形性质)\nProve that the opposite angles of a parallelogram are equal. (证明平行四边形的对角相等。)
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Complex Compound Area (复杂复合面积)\nCalculate the area of the following shape: a large rectangle (15m by 8m) with a smaller rectangle (5m by 3m) cut out from its center, and two identical triangles (base 4m, height 3m) attached to the longer sides of the large rectangle. (计算以下图形的面积：一个大长方形（15米x8米），中间挖去一个小长方形（5米x3米），并在大长方形的两条长边上各附加一个相同的三角形（底4米，高3米）。)

### Homework 2: Perimeter with Algebra (代数周长)\nThe perimeter of a rectangle is $40$ cm. Its length is $(3x + 2)$ cm and its width is $(x - 1)$ cm. Find the value of $x$ and the actual dimensions of the rectangle.

### Homework 3: Symmetry and Properties (对称与性质)\nDraw a rhombus. Draw all its lines of symmetry. What is its order of rotational symmetry? How do its diagonals relate to its lines of symmetry?

### Homework 4: Real-Life Tiling (实际铺砖)\nA rectangular floor measures 6 meters by 4 meters. It is to be tiled with square tiles of side length 20 cm. How many tiles are needed to cover the entire floor? (一块长6米、宽4米的长方形地板，要用边长20厘米的正方形瓷砖铺设。需要多少块瓷砖才能铺满整个地板？)

### Homework 5: Proof of Rectangle (长方形的证明)\nGiven a quadrilateral ABCD where all four angles are right angles. Prove that its opposite sides are parallel and equal in length, thus proving it is a rectangle.

### Homework 6: Median Line in a Triangle (三角形中位线)\nIn triangle PQR, M is the midpoint of PQ and N is the midpoint of PR. If MN = 7 cm, what is the length of QR? Explain your reasoning.

learning_objectives.objective: Use the perpendicular bisector to find the minimal distance between two parallel lines. 使用垂直平分线找到两条平行线之间的最短距离。
Calculate the area and perimeter for 2D shape, with a focus upon quadrilaterals. Find the areas of complex compound shapes. 计算二维图形的面积和周长，特别是四边形。找到复杂复合图形的面积。
Explore and prove the property, decision (parallelogram, rectangle, rhombus and square) and median line theories.
Identify lines of symmetry of 2D solids along with the order of rotational symmetry. 探索并证明属性决定（平行四边形、矩形、菱形和正方形）和中位线理论。
To recognize and appreciate rotational and reflective symmetry in real-life, in art for example. 识别二维固体的对称轴以及旋转对称的顺序。

sub_units.title: Optional 可选
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1: Define Tessellation (定义镶嵌)\nWhat is a tessellation? Explain in your own words. (什么是镶嵌？用你自己的话解释。)

### Exercise 2: Identifying Tessellating Shapes (识别可镶嵌图形)\nWhich of the following regular polygons will tessellate on their own? Square, Regular Pentagon, Regular Hexagon, Equilateral Triangle.

### Exercise 3: Why Triangles Tessellate (为什么三角形可以镶嵌)\nExplain why any triangle can tessellate. (提示：考虑一个顶点周围的角度总和。)

### Exercise 4: Drawing a Tessellation (绘制镶嵌图案)\nDraw a simple tessellation using only squares and equilateral triangles. (使用正方形和等边三角形绘制一个简单的镶嵌图案。)

### Exercise 5: Real-Life Tessellations (现实生活中的镶嵌)\nLook around the classroom or at pictures of buildings. Can you identify any examples of tessellations in real life? List at least two examples.
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1: Why a Pentagon Doesn't Tessellate (为什么五边形不能镶嵌)\nExplain why a regular pentagon cannot tessellate on its own. Use the concept of interior angles in your explanation. (解释为什么正五边形不能单独镶嵌。在你的解释中运用内角的概念。)

### Homework 2: Design Your Own Tessellation (设计你自己的镶嵌图案)\nDesign and draw a tessellation using at least two different types of regular polygons. You may use colours to enhance your design.

### Homework 3: Research Real-Life Tessellations (研究现实生活中的镶嵌)\nFind three different examples of tessellations in architecture, art, or nature. For each example, describe the shapes used and where you found it. (找到三个不同的镶嵌实例，可以是建筑、艺术或自然界中的。对于每个例子，描述所使用的形状以及你在哪里找到它。)

### Homework 4: Angles and Tessellation (角度与镶嵌)\nIf a shape has an interior angle of $108^\circ$, can it tessellate on its own? Justify your answer mathematically.

### Homework 5: Creative Tessellation (创意镶嵌)\nThink about how tessellations are used in patterns for fabrics or wallpapers. Create a small sketch of a pattern that could be used for wallpaper, explaining which shapes or transformations you used.

learning_objectives.objective: [Optional] Tessellations of 2D patterns. Understand why some 2D shapes and patterns will tesselate while other will not. 二维图形的镶嵌。理解为什么某些二维图形和图案可以镶嵌，而其他的不可以。
[Optional] Investigate tessellation in real-life (art, flooring, pavements etc.). 调查实际生活中的镶嵌（艺术、地板、铺路等）。

teachingUnits.title: Percentages 百分比
learning_objectives: To be able to convert between fractions, decimals, and percentages. 能够在分数、小数和百分比之间转换。
To be able to calculate a given percentage of a quantity. 能够计算给定数量的百分比。
To be able to write one quantity as a percentage of another. 能够将一个数量写成另一个数量的百分比。
To apply simple percentage change (increase or decrease). 应用简单的百分比变化（增加或减少）。
To use a calculator efficiently. Apply appropriate checks of accuracy. 高效使用计算器。应用适当的准确性检查。
Understand the differences between simple and compound interest and be able to calculate both. 理解简单和复利的区别，并能够计算两者。
Carry out calculations involving reverse percentages. 进行涉及反向百分比的计算。

Use given data to solve problems on personal and household finance involving earnings, interest, tax, discounts, loans, mortgages, credit cards, savings etc. 使用给定数据解决涉及个人和家庭财务的实际问题，包括收入、利息、税、折扣、贷款、抵押贷款、信用卡、储蓄等。
Extract data from various tables and charts and calculate percentages based on this data. Make inferences of data based on percentages. 从各种表格和图表中提取数据，并基于这些数据计算百分比。根据百分比对数据进行推断。
Use exponential growth and decay in relation to population and finance. Cross-curricular link to sciences. 在人口和财务中使用指数增长和衰减。与科学课程的跨学科联系。

sub_units.title: Recap 回顾
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1\nConvert $\frac{3}{5}$ to a decimal and a percentage. 将 $\frac{3}{5}$ 转换为小数和百分比。

### Exercise 2\nConvert $0.75$ to a fraction in its simplest form and a percentage. 将 $0.75$ 转换为最简分数和百分比。

### Exercise 3\nConvert $45\%$ to a fraction in its simplest form and a decimal. 将 $45\%$ 转换为最简分数和小数。

### Exercise 4\nCalculate $20\%$ of $150$ kg. 计算 $150$ 公斤的 $20\%$。

### Exercise 5\nA shirt costs $£40$. It is on sale with a $15\%$ discount. What is the new price of the shirt? 一件衬衫售价 $£40$。它打 $15\%$ 的折扣。这件衬衫的新价格是多少？

### Exercise 6\nIn a class of $30$ students, $18$ are girls. What percentage of the class are girls? 一个班级有 $30$ 名学生，其中 $18$ 名是女生。女生占全班的百分之几？

### Exercise 7\nA car's value decreased from $£12,000$ to $£10,800$. Calculate the percentage decrease in its value. 一辆汽车的价值从 $£12,000$ 下降到 $£10,800$。计算其价值的百分比下降。

### Exercise 8\nA shop increased the price of a toy by $10\%$. The original price was $£25$. What is the new price? 商店将一个玩具的价格提高了 $10\%$。原价是 $£25$。新价格是多少？
sub_units.homework_content:
### Homework 1\nComplete the table: 完成下表：
| Fraction 分数 | Decimal 小数 | Percentage 百分比 |
|---------------|--------------|-------------------|
| $\frac{7}{8}$ |              |                   |
|               | $0.04$       |                   |
|               |              | $125\%$           |

### Homework 2\nCalculate: 计算：\na) $35\%$ of $£240$\nb) $12.5\%$ of $80$ meters\nc) $150\%$ of $60$

### Homework 3\nA student scored $68$ marks out of a total of $80$ marks in a math test. What percentage did the student score? 一名学生在数学考试中得了 $68$ 分（总分 $80$ 分）。该学生得了百分之几？

### Homework 4\nThe population of a town was $15,000$. It increased by $8\%$ in one year. What is the new population? 一个城镇的人口是 $15,000$ 人。一年内增加了 $8\%$。新人口是多少？

### Homework 5\nA jacket was originally priced at $£80$. During a sale, it was sold for $£64$. Calculate the percentage discount. 一件夹克的原价是 $£80$。在一次促销活动中，它以 $£64$ 的价格出售。计算折扣百分比。

### Homework 6\nA shopkeeper buys a bicycle for $£120$ and sells it for $£150$. Calculate the percentage profit. If he later offers a $10\%$ discount on the selling price, what is the new selling price and what is his new percentage profit based on the original cost? 一位店主以 $£120$ 的价格购买了一辆自行车，并以 $£150$ 的价格出售。计算利润百分比。如果他后来在售价上提供 $10\%$ 的折扣，新的售价是多少？基于原始成本，他的新利润百分比是多少？

learning_objectives.objective: To be able to convert between fractions, decimals, and percentages. 能够在分数、小数和百分比之间转换。
To be able to calculate a given percentage of a quantity. 能够计算给定数量的百分比。
To be able to write one quantity as a percentage of another. 能够将一个数量写成另一个数量的百分比。
To apply simple percentage change (increase or decrease). 应用简单的百分比变化（增加或减少）。

sub_units.title: Percentages 百分比
sub_units.classroom_exercises:
### Exercise 1\nUse your calculator to find $17.5\%$ of $£345.60$. Round your answer to two decimal places. 使用计算器计算 $£345.60$ 的 $17.5\%$。将答案四舍五入到两位小数。

### Exercise 2\nCalculate the simple interest on an investment of $£5000$ at an annual interest rate of $3\%$ for $4$ years. 计算 $£5000$ 投资在年利率 $3\%$ 下 $4$ 年的单利。

### Exercise 3\nAn item is sold for $£60$ after a $20\%$ discount. What was the original price of the item? 一件商品打 $20\%$ 折后售价为 $£60$。该商品的原价是多少？

### Exercise 4\nCalculate the compound interest on an investment of $£2000$ at an annual interest rate of $5\%$ for $3$ years. (Show your working for each year or use the formula $A = P(1+r)^n$). 计算 $£2000$ 投资在年利率 $5\%$ 下 $3$ 年的复利。（请显示每年的计算过程或使用公式 $A = P(1+r)^n$）。

### Exercise 5\nA company's sales increased by $15\%$ this year to $£1,150,000$. What were the sales last year? 某公司今年的销售额增长了 $15\%$，达到 $£1,150,000$。去年的销售额是多少？

### Exercise 6\nThe population of a city is currently $250,000$. If it grows at an annual rate of $2.5\%$, what will the population be in $5$ years? (Round to the nearest whole number). 某城市目前人口为 $250,000$ 人。如果每年以 $2.5\%$ 的速度增长， $5$ 年后人口将是多少？（四舍五入到最接近的整数）。

### Exercise 7\nA bank offers a savings account with a $2\%$ annual interest rate, compounded annually. Another bank offers a simple interest rate of $2.1\%$ annually. If you invest $£1000$ for $5$ years, which bank offers a better return? 一家银行提供年利率 $2\%$ 的储蓄账户，每年复利计算。另一家银行提供年利率 $2.1\%$ 的单利。如果你投资 $£1000$ 持续 $5$ 年，哪家银行的回报更好？
sub_units.homework_content:
